category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/pseudomuto/protoc-gen-doc describes protoc-gen-doc as a documentation generator plugin for protoc.
source_facts.description says it is a documentation generator plugin for Google Protocol Buffers.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/pseudomuto/protoc-gen-doc uses the project name protoc-gen-doc.
docs_sources: The official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found for protoc-gen-doc.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/pseudomuto/protoc-gen-doc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository documents the protoc plugin workflow.
source_facts.description identifies a Protocol Buffers documentation generator plugin.
